_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Nginx New
author: info@finniedj.nl
description: A clean, minimal Nginx egg for hosting any static website, with an optional PHP-FPM toggle.
startup: rm -rf /home/container/tmp/*; mkdir -p /home/container/tmp; CONF=/home/container/nginx/conf.d/default.conf; sed -i "/^##PHP_LOCATION_START##$/,/^##PHP_LOCATION_END##$/d" "$CONF"; if [ "${PHP_ENABLED}" = "1" ] || [ "${PHP_ENABLED}" = "true" ]; then echo "✓ PHP включен"; { echo "##PHP_LOCATION_START##"; cat /home/container/nginx/php-location.conf; echo "##PHP_LOCATION_END##"; } > /home/container/tmp/php-location-built.conf; sed -i "/^[[:space:]]*##PHP_LOCATION_BLOCK##[[:space:]]*$/r /home/container/tmp/php-location-built.conf" "$CONF"; php-fpm83 -D; fi; echo "✓ Сервер запущен"; /usr/sbin/nginx -c /home/container/nginx/nginx.conf -p /home/container/

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
cd /mnt/server
git clone https://github.com/XfeaturesDEV/eggs-.git ./temp
cp -r ./temp/nginx /mnt/server/
rm -rf ./temp
mkdir /mnt/server/tmp
mkdir /mnt/server/logs
mkdir /mnt/server/webroot

variables.name: Enable PHP
variables.description: Turns on PHP-FPM support (.php files) for this server. Leave at 0 for a plain static Nginx site.
